data.body:
## Description

**What**: Update existing project documentation to reflect the new brainstorm research phase, scenario analysis, approval gate, and preplanning research capabilities.
**Why**: Future agents need accurate awareness of the planning intelligence features to use them effectively.
**Scope**:
- IN: Update CLAUDE.md (architecture section, quick reference) to document new brainstorm and preplanning capabilities
- OUT: Creating new documentation files — updates to existing docs only

## Done Definitions

- When this story is complete, CLAUDE.md accurately describes the research phase, scenario analysis, approval gate, and preplanning research capabilities added by this epic
- When this story is complete, any other existing documentation that references brainstorm or preplanning workflow is updated to reflect the new phases


## Notes
